name: Data Analysis
description: Advanced Data Analysis MCP server - automatically analyzes datasets and generates interactive dashboards with charts, statistics, and insights
author: FluidMCP

tools.name: visualize_dataset
tools.description: Primary tool that accepts a dataset and returns a full interactive dashboard with auto-generated charts, statistics, and insights

tools.name: explore_dataset
tools.description: Returns a paginated searchable data table with column statistics sidebar and CSV export functionality

tools.name: get_insights
tools.description: Returns a styled insights report with dataset summary, statistical findings, correlation matrix, and visualization suggestions
